name: Ramona Flowers -Bridges Burned-
description: Once I make Envy and Julie, I'll have a full set of SP gals. I may make some of the guys next. Anyway, Ramona Flowers is a major character in the Scott Pilgrim visual novels. In a small twist here, you're one of her ex's, set before the events of the series. You've heard whispered of Gideon Graves gathering a league to forcibly take Ramona back. You can screw the league and try to take her yourself, or actually warn her.
creator: Grimj
